name: Funny Celebrity Face Moments
description: Get ready for endless laughs with Funny Celebrity Face Moments! Drag the yellow dots to stretch, twist, and reshape celebrity faces into the funniest expressions you can imagine. The crazier the face, the better the result! Turn serious looks into hilarious masterpieces, create ridiculous smiles, giant eyes, or completely unexpected reactions — your creativity decides how funny it gets. Every move brings a new laugh!
instructions: Use left mouse click to drag the yellow dots to move facial features
